title: Exmate 12V 3.5Ah Battery for Hitachi EB1212S EB1214L EB1214S EB1220BL EB1220HS EB1222HL EB1226HL EB1230HL BCC1212
features: High quality Ni-MH battery - provides up to 500 cycles, 3500mAh capacity, no memory effect, more durable, stronger
Certification: the battery has passed CE / RoHS certificates, does not contain Hg / Cd / Pb, no pollution, use safer
Safe and reliable compatible with HITACHI 320386, 320387, 320388, 320606, 320608,320686,321652,322434,322629,323226, with short circuit, overheat, overcharge protection function
Factory outlet strict production quality assurance, a competitive price and good customer service
Warranty - 30 days money back, 7 x 24 hours friendly customer service support and we will always try our best for 100% customer satisfaction
description: About Exmate: Exmate is a world-renowned brand that has its own manufacturer of power tools, vacuum batteries and chargers 20 years of experience in research & development and manufacturing make us more professional in quality control, with experience and customer service. We now meet our customers directly and offer the best offer, please buy with confidence. Replace Part Number: HITACHI:320386,320387,320388,320606,320608,320686,321652 322434,322629,323226,324279,324360,324366. 1,324362 cm EB 1212S,EB 1214L,EB 1214S,EB 1220BL,EB 1220HL,EB 1220HS EB 1220RS,EB 1222HL,EB 1226HL,EB 1230HL,EB 1230R,EB 1230X,EB 1233X Compatible with: (Please search with "Ctrl + F") HITACHI C 5D, CD 4D, CL 13D DB 12DM2 DH 15D2, DH 15DV DN 12DY, DN 12DYK, DN 12Y DS 10DTA, DS 10DVA, DS 12DM, DS 12DM2, DS 12DV, DS 12DVB, DS 12DVB2, DS 12DVB2KS, DS 12DVF, DS 12DVF2, DS 12DVF3. DW 18D FDS 12DVC FDV 12DV FWH 12DC2, FWH 12DC3, FWH 12DD, FWH 12DF, FWH12DC4. R 9D RB 18D UB 12DL, UB 5D. WH 12DAF, WH 12DAF2, WH 12DC, WH 12DM, WH 12DM2, WH 12DM2K, WH 12DMR, WH 12DMR2 WP 12DA WR 12DAF, WR 12DAF2, WR 12DM, WR 12DM2, WR 12DMR Packaging: 1 x replacement battery. Warranty: 30 days full refund and return, we promise to provide the best products and service for you.
